scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npm run seed
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n db,api,web -c blue,green,cyan "npm run db" "timeout /t 8 /nobreak >nul && cd backend && npx prisma db push && npm run seed && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
